age.Description: Age of the participant at time of testing

handedness.Description: Dominant hand (not reported in original study)

Levels.control: Healthy young adult from Shenzhen University

n_sessions.Description: Number of recording sessions (2 for all 95 subjects)

n_epochs_total.Description: Total number of epochs across all sessions, tasks, and competition sets

n_tasks.Description: Number of distinct task types available for this subject

in_enrollment.Description: Whether subject appears in the Enrollment set (session 1, training data)

in_calibration.Description: Whether subject appears in the Calibration set (session 2, 20 subjects for tuning)

in_testing.Description: Whether subject appears in the Testing set (session 2, evaluation)
